title: Notifications
description: Manage reminders for every tool and module.

globalMaster.label: Notifications enabled
globalMaster.hint: Turns off every reminder. Your schedules are saved and resume when you switch this back on.

perTargetMaster.label: Enable reminders
perTargetMaster.hint: Turns all reminders here on or off.

comingSoon.hint: Reminders for this tool aren't available yet.

cbt.title: CBT check-in
cbt.body: Notice a thought and meet it with more balance.

act.title: ACT check-in
act.body: Notice an unhelpful thought and gently unhook from it.

meditation.title: Time to meditate
meditation.body: Take a few minutes to settle your attention.

mood.title: Mood check-in
mood.body: Take a few seconds — how are you feeling?

journal.title: Time to journal
journal.body: A few lines about your day can help it make sense.

gratitude.title: A moment of gratitude
gratitude.body: What's one small thing you're grateful for?

grounding.title: A grounding moment
grounding.body: Pause and reconnect with your senses for a minute.

breathing.title: Time to breathe
breathing.body: A short break to settle your body and mind.

sleep.title: Wind down for sleep
sleep.body: Log how you slept and ease into a restful night.

habits.title: Time for your habits
habits.body: Take a quick look at today's habits.

act.label: ACT
act.description: Reminders for defusion, values, and committed action.

gratitude.label: Gratitude log
gratitude.description: Reminders to capture a moment of gratitude.

journal.label: Journal
journal.description: Reminders to write a journal entry.
